| | | Friend, where will the Democrats stop?

**First** , they halt the Keystone XL Pipeline, eliminating thousands of jobs and destroying a key industry.

**Then** , they decide to waste critical time during a global pandemic to push their vindictive political agenda.

**And this week, 91% of Pelosi's version of the COVID relief package wasn't even for COVID relief, Friend**.

---
| | [CHIP IN TO WIN BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OjBUe9UxRVwooqwiHOJBS-grbWP1SP2jwlhOlLrXyDr7z_9KdknXjcuRuaM9yqhBgh-85PSmiryu77i_kWMH0kAo0xztHxUo_pQ6UAZHn0l-EefziBSvAPAdvpHr95MMMIpC4O1UOfnHtuufqdW55Y_sLCk07_tEpUMBuWg6g_nj5W6ZdKKBssDuR8XQl-AV_iFzwP-D19Le1rDcrid_DnhMHvXRNUESgTrpw8R0GULi5LzqVOBsZvL1xjZqGvJSuEKcIMjQeXC72z32Xjk9SCKw_ZaUrfafGa90rGvevdXC9pFGNNJAnFlAvK3othUySn6JRpJJtaJ9yd_-resCA7RMuVXkcrPvkNMW_1tg-7SM2at_ME-u0SGojHjbnhE94nI8EwpgeZQrQpeT8DLykG-OssVO-ucc&c=_zkdCbpV6XEo0rL5QARafjUXGUD_xOMbWVBdFFiLyxsYV8UsUAxSvg==&ch=A1Vl2QEfrvSQSW3xos3LstlsHYa5LJZ7usNfPY3s6MpgLQ4zrIjhzw== "CHIP IN TO WIN BACK THE SENATE")
---

They have only been in power for a few weeks, yet it is already abundantly clear they aren't suited for it. They would rather manipulate the American people and push their political goals and pet projects than deliver any real change or help. It is appalling.

That is why it is so important that Republicans win back the Senate in 2022. ")_**

| | [CHIP IN TO WIN BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OjBUe9UxRVwooqwiHOJBS-grbWP1SP2jwlhOlLrXyDr7z_9KdknXjcuRuaM9yqhBgh-85PSmiryu77i_kWMH0kAo0xztHxUo_pQ6UAZHn0l-EefziBSvAPAdvpHr95MMMIpC4O1UOfnHtuufqdW55Y_sLCk07_tEpUMBuWg6g_nj5W6ZdKKBssDuR8XQl-AV_iFzwP-D19Le1rDcrid_DnhMHvXRNUESgTrpw8R0GULi5LzqVOBsZvL1xjZqGvJSuEKcIMjQeXC72z32Xjk9SCKw_ZaUrfafGa90rGvevdXC9pFGNNJAnFlAvK3othUySn6JRpJJtaJ9yd_-resCA7RMuVXkcrPvkNMW_1tg-7SM2at_ME-u0SGojHjbnhE94nI8EwpgeZQrQpeT8DLykG-OssVO-ucc&c=_zkdCbpV6XEo0rL5QARafjUXGUD_xOMbWVBdFFiLyxsYV8UsUAxSvg==&ch=A1Vl2QEfrvSQSW3xos3LstlsHYa5LJZ7usNfPY3s6MpgLQ4zrIjhzw== "CHIP IN TO WIN BACK THE SENATE")

As the Democrats get more comfortable with total control, there is no telling what they will do and where they will go. They will work for higher taxes. They will work to censor more conservative voices. And they will continue to not uphold the Constitution, Friend.

A Republican Majority is needed in the Senate again. And you can help us get that done.

subject: FWD: Joe Biden says he will be tough on China, Mike Pompeo knows that isn’t true.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Did you see Mike Pompeo speak on Fox News the other day?

_Important Message Enclosed_

**Did you see Mike Pompeo speak on Fox News the other day? He sent you an email about it** , and frankly, we wish more Conservatives would stand up to the Democrats for the massive break China gets under their policies.

**If you have 5 minutes you should really take a look at the email Secretary Pompeo sent you, fellow Conservative.** Conservatives showed that being tough on China over the last 4 years helped benefit so many Americans. Now, Joe Biden wants to reverse it. See for yourself...

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Mike Pompeo, former Secretary of State **
Date: Tue, Feb 23, 2021 at 12:55 PM
Subject: A Conservative Majority will help keep America on top--will you help me stop the Democrats from undoing our work?

It's Mike Pompeo.

I was given your email because I'm told you agree that a Conservative agenda is what is best for America.

Not too long ago, I spoke on Fox News condemning President Biden's comment that "America is back" in the world. Back to what? The world before I was Secretary of State? A world in which:

1\. ISIS had control over most of Syria and threatened the world with its terror?
2\. A world in which thousands of jobs in America were lost to China?

Obviously, the Democrats don't realize that they are part of the problem. **A Conservative Majority in Congress will be the balance of power that makes sure that the Democrats don 't take us back to this fantasy world where "America is back" to letting China make the rules.** [**That can only happen if you help us. name: Tim Scott
subject: I am not a prop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I will be honest, very little these days surprises me. Unfortunately, I have become accustomed to hearing casual racism and insults from the "tolerant" Left. After all, I am a proud black Republican. But the other night, MSNBC host Joy Reid sunk to a new low, claiming I was only appearing at a press conference to give the illusion of diversity.
Friend,

Here we go again.

As my Republican colleagues and I were speaking out against the job-killing minimum wage proposal, the liberal media immediately launched a vicious attack against me.

**The liberal media can 't resist attacking me for the color of my skin.**

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop)

Instead of debating the merits of our ideas, **MSNBC claimed I was nothing more than a prop.[Their host called me nothing but someone who provides "a patina of diversity."](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop)**

Check out the clip for yourself:
[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop)
[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/)

It's sad and ironic that the party of "tolerance" and "diversity" can't stand to hear my point of view.

Friend, I don't fit the narrative that the liberal media has created for conservatives. So whenever I tell my story or speak up, the Left immediately resorts to name-calling and shameful attacks.

We cannot allow the liberal media's racist and offensive words to go unanswered. Will you join me and fight back against these hurtful and divisive remarks?

[**Chip in $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford to send a strong message that we won 't tolerate these insults.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop)

[**I need you to stand with me**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop). This is not the first time I have faced attacks from the Left, and it certainly will not be the last.

[**Please join me by making a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever amount you can afford to fight back.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210307_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050394-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210307_i-am-not-a-prop)

Senator Tim Scott

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Need You to Contact These Legislators
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=need_you_to_contact&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We have an important vote coming up this week in the legislature. This coming Saturday marks the One-Year anniversary of Governor Walz’ unilateral declaration of emergency powers. The idea that our state has been in an “emergency” for a whole year is ridiculous. And the idea that a Governor can unilaterally declare it and act as a dictator is the most anti-American ideal I’ve seen in my life.** That’s why we are forcing a vote this week on the End Walz’ Emergency Powers Resolution in the Minnesota House. Politicians in St Paul have an important decision. They can continue to allow the Governor to infringe on our rights or they can do the right thing, and End Governor Walz’ Emergency Powers once and for all. No longer can we allow one man to decide to shut down large portions of our economy, force youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports, or lock us in our homes. It’s time to say to the political class that our Constitution is no longer suspended. Give us back our government! In a minute, I’m going to ask you to contact politicians like Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard, Mike Sundin and Paul Marquart. But first, I want to tell you what these Con Artists will say to try to get you off their backs. Republicans and Demcorats have been busy crafting a Fake End Walz’ Powers bill that gives Minnesotans the illusion they are on their side, but really keeps Walz’ powers intact so he can continue eroding our freedoms. **We just watched this great Con happen in real time in New York. Remember all the media coverage about Governor Andrew Cuomo losing his emergency powers? Turns out, New York Democrats operate out of the same playbook as the DFL.** The [bill touted as Ending Cuomo’s Emergency Powers](https://www.action4liberty.com/fake_end_cuomo_s_power_bill_biggest_con_of_the_year?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=need_you_to_contact&n=2) actually leaves Cuomo’s executive orders in place, which include the business restrictions and the mask mandate. Cuomo can still unilaterally extend those. After nearly a whole year of exercising unilateral law making, Cuomo's powers were set to expire in April. But the New York bill now extends the unilateral orders mentioned above, indefinitely. Which is precisely why all Republicans in the legislature voted against the bill. And, although Cuomo is unable to issue new executive orders without legislative approval, he plans to sign the bill since it leaves him in relatively the same position. And that’s how you know it’s FAKE! No Governor would sign a bill that would take away his own powers. What Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard are crafting right now is just as fake as the New York bill. It will keep most of Governor Walz’ powers in place, make the mask mandate permanent, and continue to allow Walz to unilaterally declare emergency powers. Meanwhile, their bill doesn’t have a Citizens’ Bill of Rights for emergencies, it doesn’t stop the Governor’s executive orders from being treated as law and it doesn’t put the legislature in charge of declaring an emergency.
## Plain and simple, it doesn’t End Walz’ Emergency Powers.
On the other hand, what liberty champion Erik Mortensen is doing will terminate Walz’ Emergency Powers immediately. That’s why it’s critically important for these politicians to vote YES on the Rep Mortensen Resolution to End Walz’ Emergency Powers
## Contact
### Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 - [rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn](mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn)
### Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 - [rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn](mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn)
### Mike Sundin - 651-296-4308 - [rep.mike.sundin@house.mn](mailto:rep.mike.sundin@house.mn)
### Paul Marquart - 651-296-6829 - [rep.paul.marquart@house.mn](mailto:rep.paul.marquart@house.mn)
Sample Script Rep _______, I’m contacting you to End Walz’ Emergency Powers by voting YES on the Mortensen Resolution. One Year of a unilaterally declared emergency is too long. We want our government back! Don’t allow Governor Walz to create orders anymore that lock us in our homes, force youth athletes to wear masks and shut down our economy. Please stop wasting our time with the Fake End Walz’ Powers bill in the Legislative Process Reform Committee. Do what’s right, and End Walz’ Emergency Powers now by voting YES on Rep Mortensen’s Resolution. Alternate Script Rep _______, I was so proud of you standing up to your Party last year and voting to End Walz’ Emergency Powers several times. It’s unfortunate that you betrayed us this year by reversing course and protecting Walz. Now we’re on the cusp of one whole year of his emergency and you are pretending like you’re solving the problem by crafting a Fake End Walz’ Powers Bill in the Legislative Process Reform Committee. Stop playing politics with our liberties and vote YES on the End Walz’ Emergency Powers Resolution this week. Stand up for rural Minnesota values; not Metro Democrat ones. Once you reach out to them, I’d love to hear from you. Feel free to email me and let me know you contacted these vulnerable Democrats. Don’t like calling or emailing? You can still be a huge help to us by [supporting](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=need_you_to_contact&n=3) our field operations. We now have two places up north and a growing team of paid field staff who are contacting thousands of voters every week in the districts of these vulnerable Democrats. They just started doorknocking in Rep Mike Sundin's district this weekend. And they aren’t going anywhere as long as these politicians continue voting against us. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=need_you_to_contact&n=4) **If you would like to help[fund our field operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=need_you_to_contact&n=5), please click here to make a donation.** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
